expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
expectations.evidence: The review header states: 'Branch target: v18/dev'.

expectations.text: Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default payload type
expectations.evidence: The Cross-Cutting Concerns section states: 'Changing the DefaultPayloadType constant from Legacy to Minimal means that users upgrading from v17 to v18 who have not explicitly set a PayloadType in their WebhookSettings configuration will silently receive a different payload format.' Clear behavioral impact discussion.
The review is 93 lines, under the 150-line threshold.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues (formatting, whitespace, naming conventions, comment grammar, code style preferences) unless they affect performance or rendering. Missing JSDoc on new public APIs is NOT a stylistic issue -- it is a legitimate finding.
expectations.evidence: No cosmetic/stylistic findings. All findings are about documentation accuracy, behavioral changes, and code quality (magic strings to constants).

expectations.text: Does NOT flag the ~30 builder extension methods with Legacy defaults (pre-existing, not changed in the PR)
expectations.evidence: No mention of builder extension methods or Legacy defaults in methods outside the PR scope. The review stays focused on the 3 changed files and their immediate consumers.

expectations.text: Flags stale WebhookSettings.cs docs as a side-effect of the constant value change
expectations.evidence: Issue 2 states: 'Medium -- Stale doc in WebhookSettings.cs -- /src/Umbraco.Core/Configuration/Models/WebhookSettings.cs lines 82-84 still say: By default, Legacy payloads are used... This default will change to minimal starting from v17. This is now incorrect for v18 -- it should say that Minimal payloads are used by default.'

expectations.text: Identifies affected consumers outside the PR (WebhookSettings, UmbracoBuilder, or WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions)
expectations.evidence: The Impact Scope section lists: 'The DefaultPayloadType constant is referenced in 4 locations: Constants-Webhooks.cs (definition), WebhookSettings.cs line 22, UmbracoBuilder.Collections.cs line 97, WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions.cs line 19.' All three external consumers identified.

eval_feedback.overall: Excellent review that passes all assertions. Thorough consumer identification and side-effect detection.
